feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dec.EWM 9.3 Custom code Migration to S/4 HANA 2021 Embedded EWM
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are migrating from Dec SCM EWM 9.3 to S/4 HANA 2021 Embedded EWM. Our goal is to migrate the custom code for this migration, and for that, we are referring to the attached Migration Guide "How to Migrate from SAP EWM (Business Suite) to EWM Based on SAP S/4HANA."

However, we have noticed that there is no clear process mentioned in section 3.1 of the guide for custom code migration. We intended to use the Import/Export mechanism but found that transaction codes like CG3Y and CG3Z are not supported in the source EWM system version 9.3.

Anyone has experience with such scenario & guide further on this? We explored other options like FM- ARCHIVFILE_CLIENT_TO_SERVER, but it is not suitable for us & is dependent on the service provider. 

Thanks & Regards,

Sagar

entry.title: How to get Equipment Num, Serial Num tied to Sales Order No
entry.content:
IH10 gives me Equipment Num ("Equipment"), Serial Num ("Serial Number") and Customer Info. 

When I go into "Object History" from an entry in the "Equipment" column, I am able to see all the Sales Order numbers tied to that equipment number. 

I want to pull a report with Sales Order No, Equipment Number and Serial Number so that I can tie it back to the COPA reports.

Does this report exist?

entry.title: MRP Live Scheduling MRP Type X0 Materials
entry.content: Running S4/Hana and MRP Live.  Planning is done in an external system and integrated into SAP.  Materials planned externally use MRP Type X0.  We have found that MRP Live reschedules planned orders that came from external system and changes dates/times, adding a Detailed Scheduling tab that was not there previously.  The only way we have found to stop this behavior is to exclude certain MRP Controllers from MRP Live.  This works fine with batch jobs, but having trouble stopping end users from running improperly which then creates a mess for the schedulers in the planning system to reschedule their planned orders.  Is there a setting somewhere that would stop this behavior?

entry.title: Goods receipt slip for certain suppliers
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I am trying to configure the print output for output type WE03 (GR Note Version 3) for certain vendors. Background of this comes from the requirement, that certain vendors ask for a GR confirmation with a signature from customer. I have maintained a corresponding condition record for a specific vendor in MN21

Somehow, if I create GR for a PO (movement type 101) for a different vendor than stated in the condition record, the system still generates an output. How can limit the output generation to vendors maintained in the condition record? 

Also If I add another condition record for a different supplier, I get an warning message and saving is not possible.

 

Is there any additional configuration needed to fulfill this requirement? 

Thanks and regards

entry.title: Update gold price from file
entry.content:
Hi together,

gold price changes daily. Is there a way to update the condition for GAU2 in transaction MEK1 or MEK2 automatically?

Our supplier can deliver the file.

There is report RFTBFF00, but for Commodities there is no example how to do it.

Thanks for your help

Winfried

entry.title: Unable to Claim Miscellaneous Charges of a PO
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

I wanted some help regarding claiming miscellaneous charges of a PO in MIR7. No posting has been done against the said miscellaneous charges as can be seen in purchase order history. Only the unit rates upto a maximum of 244,500 have been claimed

There are also additional charges of 50,000 added in header conditions of the PO under ZOC3

However when i try to claim this in MIR7, amount and quantity tabs are greyed out with 0 values

I don't know what the error is and why SAP isn't letting me claim this amount. Any and all help is greatly appreciated

Important Notes

1- Applicable Account Assignments are not Locked

2- PO delivery status is incomplete

entry.title: Stock transport order serialized in 1 step
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I am trying to perform stock transfer order for serialized material in one-step (Movement type 647) but it is hitting a blocking error IO306 and I cannot post the goods issue (VL02N). Could you please assist me?

For non-serial material it is working fine.

entry.title: The transport request (TR) option is disabled for the configuration 'Define Shipping Data for Plants
entry.content:
Hi,

The system does not prompt for the transport request (TR) after the changes; it is disabled for the config ‘’Define Shipping Data for Plants’’.

SPRO Menu Path: SAP Reference IMG->Materials Management -> Purchasing -> Purchase Order -> Set up Stock Transport Order-> Define Shipping Data for Plants

Tran-code: S_ALR_87002189

SAP Product: S4HANA ON PREMISE

Release: 2023

 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Manohar.

entry.title: Modify text for purchase order print output (ME9F)
entry.content:
Dear Experts, There is some text printed on purchase order output (ME9F). I am not able to figure out how I can update it. Any idea please?

For eg: I want to update below text which is in the last page of the purchase order when I take out the printout by ME9F.

entry.title: Movement type 325 using delivery
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need to use the movement type 325 in STO with delivery.

I have defined a new document type (STO), delivery type, Item category type and so on.

The process run properly and determine the 325 when creating the Delivery via VL10B, but at the good movement posting, the system is raising the error message: Update control of movement type is incorrect (entry 325 X X _ L).

Since the 325 is not configured for L option, is there a way to avoid this error?

Maybe something that I have wrongly configured.

Thank you.

entry.title: Trigger BAdI /SCWM/EX_CORE_CO_POST during CHBD
entry.content:
HI Sap community,

According to this note 2573915 - Waiting WT not cancelled if LOSC WT confirmed with CHBD, we should use BAdI /SCWM/EX_CORE_CO_POST to trigger the WT cancellation for those HU-WTs that are not needed anymore. 

However, this BAdI is not called if we confirm a warehouse task with CHBD.
In case of regular confirmation or cancellation, it is called.

Any suggestions?

entry.title: Stability period for AMS
entry.content:
Hi All,

When was the stability period for Automatic model selection was added in forecast service profile? During which service pack upgrade and year, the new feature was introduced?

Thanks.

entry.title: No Goods Receive are being posted at Confirmation of Production Order(CO15)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have run CO15 but no GR (101) is occurring.
Backflush (261) is occurring.
I am not getting any errors.
There are no errors in COGI either.
Could you please tell me what reason can be assumed?

entry.title: how to implement multiple gst rates for HSN based GST calculation process for non-material code item
entry.content:
Hi,
I am using HSN/Control code based GST calculation process currently for S4 HANA on-premise.

For maintaining multiple GST rates for single HSN code of a material I am using below highlighted field to get respective gst rate based on maintained condition records.

But for non-material code items I am unable to maintain the same as I cannot maintain the Tax indicator field in material master.

so can anyone suggest me a way around this.
let me know if any further input required.

entry.title: SAP EWM
entry.content:
HI Good Day!, SAP EWM(MFS, PLC fully automated WH) :  I would like to explore about the error message Warehouse task created to access behind bin whereas Front bin already have pallet blocking and  throws error front bin occupied/blocked error. how to validate steps in /SCWM/ADHU before WT task creation to validate front bin details and move front HU some other storage bin process and then WT for behind Pallet to process automatically, our one uses MFS, PLC and fully automated. or else any other solution for this automatic internal transfer clear front bin block.

appreciate your valuable advise and solution, thank you!

entry.title: GR'ing at a different Price
entry.content:
Greetings, I had a question I was hoping the community could help with.

I have PO with a single line at a Qty of 5. The total GR value for that line is $500 ($100 x 5)

However physically this delivery was not 5 units of 1 Each, but it was actually a single box containing 5 bottles. So the PO Qty should have actually been 1.

Our warehouse then reversed the GR Qty of 5, the PO Qty was then altered to 1, and our warehouse then GR'd this 1 unit. However the GR value is now only $100, instead of the $500 we have been invoiced for.

Can anyone suggest any ideas on how I can fix this so the GR Qty is 1, and the GR Value if $500?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: MM Invoice showing two accounting documents one is posted and other is parked
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an issue, we have created an invoice document by reducing the value but not changing the quantity from GR. This created two accounting documents where one is showing parked initially and other one showing as posted and cleared.

Could you please help me with possible issues in relation to this problem;

Rgds
VK

entry.title: TLB BackTracking
entry.content:
Trying to understand OSS Note 1046965 which explains TLB Backtracking.  

TLB execution Date 23.04.2007
product A 1000 PC = 10 Pallets         date 23.04.2007
product B 1000    PC = 10 Pallets         date 23.04.2007
product B 1200    PC = 12 Pallets         date 24.04.2007
product C 1300    PC = 13 Pallets         data 25.04.2007
Pallets = 100 for Products A & B mainatined in Product Master.
Product A rounding value = 500
Product B rounding value = 200
TLB rules 6 < Pallets < 9
Pull-in Horizon : 5 Days

Scenario 1: Backtracking Off

For the current period there is a demand of 10 + 10 = 20 pallets.
As per the product sort the first load is for Quantity 1000 and rounding value multiple 2.When the load build happens it takes the first rounding value mutiple which give 5 pallets and it will loop again and take the next rounding value mutiple which will again be 5 pallets and the total would be 10 pallets, which is above the TLB rule,so the current load is invalid and no furhter build for the period is considered.If the pull-in horizon is maintained then the demand for the next days are also considered and same logic is followed to find a valid load for that period.

TLB should start with Product A which has rounding multiple of 5 and not 2 as specified above.  TLB should start with 5 Pallets of A then try adding 5 more Pallets of A, since exceeds TLB Profile why wouldn't TLB then try 2 pallets of Product B?

entry.title: EWM - Picking WT creation fails due lack of stock
entry.content:
Hi All,

In WH monitor I see the stock existing for a product and batches assigned to it. While creating Picking WT, this stock is not considered and WT creation fails . It gives the messages that Batch restricted stock is not considered for the storage types. 

Can anyone please confirm, why batch stock is not considered although batch is given during WT creation. I tried with and without batch but it gives same error 'No Source bin found'

entry.title: VMI Updates in Mass
entry.content: Hello! I apologize if this is not the correct board to post this in, but I am a data steward and we deal with turning the VMI flag off and on for vendors all the time. We have to do it manually one by one each time and it is time consuming. Does anyone know if there is a way to turn VMI flags on and off in mass at once?
